skill.name: wechat-minware

skill.description: Build, review, and refactor WeChat Mini Program (微信小程序) frontends. Use for tasks like WXML/WXSS/JS/TS structure, page routing, componentization, state management patterns, API requests, login/openid flows integration points, performance optimization (setData), security/privacy compliance, and release/QA checklists.
